title: Senior Teacher - BITS Pilani - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - BITS Pilani - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BITS Pilani. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!
